title: Project Gorilla
description: Adds a fun new gorilla mob
body:
Venture deep into the jungle and discover a brand new creature in your Minecraft survival world: the Gorilla! This mod introduces a fully animated, immersive gorilla mob that brings the untamed wilds to life. 

Bananas are now your key to bonding with the jungle’s strongest beast. Harvest bananas by breaking jungle leaves, and use them to feed and breed gorillas. Raise your own gorilla family by bringing two together for a baby gorilla companion!

Defeat gorillas and craft a unique set of Gorilla Fur Armor. Not only does it give you extra protection in the wild, but it also shows off your dominion over the jungle.

These mighty beasts can be found naturally wandering jungle biomes, making exploration more exciting and rewarding.
